sql:
SELECT  
        N.ID AS SDN_NODE_ID,
        NM.NODE_NUM AS STRRESID,
        NM.NODE_NM AS STRRESNM, 
        I.ID AS SDN_IF_ID,
        I.IF_NAME AS STRIFNM, 
        PM.IF_NUM AS STRIFID, 
        LT.TX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPS_OUT,
        LT.RX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPS_IN,
        LT.TX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPS_OUT,
        LT.RX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPS_IN,
        ROUND(AR.FLTBPSIN_THRESHOLD_UPPER::NUMERIC, 2) AS IN_THRESHOLD_UPPER, 
        ROUND(AR.FLTBPSOUT_THRESHOLD_UPPER::NUMERIC, 2) AS OUT_THRESHOLD_UPPER, 
        UO.NREN_ID,
        UO.NREN_NAME,
        TO_CHAR(LT.MEASURED_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS MEASURED_DATETIME,
        LT.ID
    FROM 
        IP_SDN.TB_LINK_TRAFFIC LT
    INNER JOIN 
        IP_SDN.TB_INTERFACE I ON LT.IF_ID = I.ID
    INNER JOIN 
        RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.IF_ID = LOWER(I.IF_NAME)
    INNER JOIN 
        IP_SDN.TB_NODE N ON I.NODE_ID = N.ID
    INNER JOIN 
        RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST NM ON N.ID = NM.IP_SDN_ID::INT
    LEFT OUTER JOIN 
        RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON UO.NODE_ID = NM.NODE_ID AND UO.IF_ID = PM.IF_ID
    LEFT OUTER JOIN 
        rca.tb_anomalous_ai_result AR 
        ON AR.STRIFID = PM.IF_NUM 
        AND AR.STRRESID = PM.NODE_NUM 
        AND AR.MEASURED_DATETIME BETWEEN '2024-12-18 19:55:00'::TIMESTAMP - interval '10 min' 
                                    AND '2024-12-18 19:55:00'::TIMESTAMP + interval '10 min' -- 시간 조건 추가
    WHERE   
        PM.NODE_NUM = NM.NODE_NUM
        AND NM.NODE_NM = 'seoul-7712'
        AND I.IF_NAME = 'ce12/1'
        AND LT.MEASURED_DATETIME BETWEEN '2024-12-18 19:55:00'::TIMESTAMP - interval '10 min' 
                                    AND '2024-12-18 19:55:00'::TIMESTAMP + interval '10 min' -- 기존 시간 조건
    ORDER BY 
        LT.ID
